name: functional_health_status
description: Measures the degree to which physical health limits an individual's capacity to perform everyday activities, including moderate exertion, stair climbing, and work or daily routines. Captures the functional burden of illness on daily life.

name: healthcare_access_and_utilization
description: Measures whether individuals are affiliated with health institutions, how they respond to health problems, what type of services they access, and the barriers they face including travel time and treatment adherence. Reflects structural and behavioral dimensions of healthcare access in Mexico.

name: financial_burden_of_healthcare
description: Captures the economic impact of healthcare on households, including out-of-pocket payments for medical attention and perceived negative effects of medical expenses on family finances. Relevant to understanding health-related economic vulnerability.

name: subjective_wellbeing_and_life_quality
description: Measures individuals' overall psychological and hedonic wellbeing, including self-rated quality of life, life satisfaction, enjoyment of life, sense of calm, satisfaction with sexual life, and self-perception of current life situation. Reflects the subjective dimension of welfare central to public opinion research.

name: health_behaviors_and_lifestyle
description: Measures health-related behavioral choices including diet (vegetable consumption and its perceived importance), tobacco use, alcohol consumption, physical activity, and engagement in recreational activities. Captures lifestyle factors that shape long-term health outcomes and are relevant to public health policy.
